prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次大幅前移（累计前移约3731名）、2026年缩招约8.3%（进一步推高位次前移）、优势学科与热门专业高度匹配（支撑位次）三重因素，位次有继续前移动力；但2024–2025年已连续两年大幅前移，继续大幅前移空间有限，且声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制报考热情。基于，结合上述因素做小幅修正，预测2026年物理类最低位次约2614名，区间2241–2987名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4860 → 5819 → 6430 → 3823 → 2699. Rankings shifted backward year by year from 2021 to 2023, then moved significantly forward starting in 2024 (3823), and further forward to 2699 in 2025, with a cumulative forward shift of about 3731 positions over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2699. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 210 students in 2021, 225 in 2022, 205 in 2023, 194 in 2024, and 192 in 2025, showing a gradual slight decrease. The 2026 plan is 176 students, a reduction of 16 students (about 8.3%) compared to 2025, which means intensified competition and pressure for ranking to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 25th in 2021, 24th in 2022, 25th in 2023, 23rd in 2024, 21st in 2025, and 23rd in 2026, consistently among the top 25 nationally, making it a top-tier engineering university. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to campus safety incidents (students assaulted by local criminal elements, with the university accused of bias and inaction), which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 74th, rated as average, with moderate short video exposure and no clear signs of heating up. There are no records of significant ranking drops or crashes for Northwestern Polytechnical University in historical admission anomalies. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in Aerospace Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Materials Science and Engineering; A in Mechanical Engineering; and A- in Control Science and Engineering, Information and Communication Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering, totaling 7 disciplines rated A- or above. These align highly with currently popular majors (Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Automation), strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, closely matching NPU's flagship disciplines, supporting the maintenance of high rankings. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province general college entrance examination is approximately 609,800, a slight increase from 2025 (606,754). Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 59.8%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 364,660, a slight increase from 2025 (363,040), leading to slightly intensified competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the Hebei Province Physics Category undergraduate batch was 448 points in 2024 and 459 points in 2025, showing an upward trend, but changes in control lines have limited impact on top 985 universities. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, and recruits across provinces in Hebei Province. In 2025, it recruited in Hebei Province for Physics Category.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward shift in rankings from 2024 to 2025 (cumulative forward shift of about 3731 positions), the approximately 8.3% enrollment reduction in 2026 (further pushing rankings forward), and the strong alignment between advantageous disciplines and popular majors (supporting rankings), there is momentum for rankings to continue moving forward. However, with two consecutive years of substantial forward shifts in 2024 and 2025, the room for further large forward shifts is limited, and the slightly negative reputation may mildly suppress application enthusiasm. Based on these factors with minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 2614, with a range of 2241 to 2987.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2614, range 2241–2987. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors as primary choices (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Aerospace Aerospace direction), use Tier 1 flagship majors (Huang Yushan Aviation Class, Computer Top-Notch Program, Chen Shiliu Flying Class, Smart Three-Aerospace Top-Notch Class) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Software, Integrated Circuits, Automation, Civil Aviation, etc.) as safe backups. With NPU reducing enrollment in Hebei Province Physics Category to 176 students in 2026, competition intensifies, so it is advisable to reasonably balance reach, match, and safety tiers.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1549 → 1587 → 1999 → 1999 → 2295, showing a gradual backward trend over the years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 746 positions in the past 5 years, and a baseline of about 2295 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 8 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 26 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 25, a decrease of 1 from 2025 (a reduction of about 3.8%), which is relatively small and has limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwestern Polytechnical University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; it consistently ranks in the top 25 nationally in the Soft Science ranking, but the university is known for engineering, and its liberal arts majors are not its strengths; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative (campus safety incidents), with average Douyin popularity (ranked 74th), which may mildly suppress the psychology of liberal arts candidates; no obvious gaps in historical submission anomaly records; all A- and above disciplines at Northwestern Polytechnical University are engineering (aeronautics and astronautics, computer science, materials, mechanical engineering, control, etc.), while liberal arts majors (Economics and Trade, Foreign Languages and Literature, Business Administration, Marxist Theory) have no corresponding A-level discipline evaluations, and the disciplinary support for liberal arts majors is relatively weak.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The History Category mainly enrolls in Economics and Trade, Foreign Languages and Literature, Business Administration, and Marxist Theory. Among these, finance/economics/economics majors have a social popularity of divided observation, foreign language majors are generally observed, and business administration is clearly discouraged, with overall popularity being neutral to low; the number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 245,140 (estimated based on the recent proportion of about 40.2%), a slight increase from 2025 (243,714), leading to a slight intensification of competition; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, and recruits across provinces in Hebei; in 2025, it enrolled 26 students in History Category in Hebei, a small number, and regional preference has limited impact on liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in History Category rankings (cumulative backward shift of about 746 positions in the past 5 years), a slight enrollment reduction of about 3.8% in 2026 (mildly pushing rankings forward), liberal arts majors not being the university's strength (weak discipline evaluation support), and the neutral social popularity of related majors, the backward trend is difficult to reverse in the short term. Based on this, with minor adjustments from the above factors, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 2292, with a range of 1965–2619.

- Business Administration (Management Experimental Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 2292, range 1965–2619. Northwestern Polytechnical University has few History Category majors in Hebei (only 4), a small enrollment (25 in 2026), and liberal arts are not its strength. It is recommended that candidates within the range prioritize Economics and Trade or Business Administration as main choices, Marxist Theory as a safe choice, and Foreign Languages and Literature as a backup. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (i.e., below 1965) can attempt to reach higher, while those near the lower limit should focus on backup majors.
